En: Amphetamine, sweet amphetamine! You feel like you should find the source... and maybe get more?
Zh: 啊，安非他命，甜美的安非他命！你觉得自己应该找出货源……也许还能再多弄点？

En: Amphetamine, sweet amphetamine! Maybe this Cuno kid knows where to find more?
Zh: 啊，安非他命，甜美的安非他命！也许那个叫坤诺的小孩知道能在哪儿找到更多？

En: Be still, my beating heart... it's amphetamine, sweet amphetamine!
Zh: 我的心脏狂跳不止！快冷静下来……这是安非他命啊，安非他命！

En: Lick it. Big-style.
Zh: 舔一口。大口一点。

En: Don't lick it.
Zh: 不要舔。

En: But that there was an interesting find -- an alternative path into the harbour that the kid uses. Well done.
Zh: “不过确实有个有趣的发现——小孩前往港口的备用通道。做得好。”

En: There's a good vague way to ask where he stands on drug use. Professionally, I mean.
Zh: 这种方法能够从侧面试探出他对使用毒品的态度。我是说，可以利用职业便利。

En: Yeah, swift, lightning justice! Faster... Harder... Justicer!
Zh: 是啊，迅速，如闪电般的正义！更快……更强……更公正！

En: See that *ladder* there? It's probably another way into the industrial harbour, no? A secret path the local kids use.
Zh: “看到那边的*梯子*了吗？也许是通往工业港口的其他通道，不是吗？可能是本地小孩子的秘密通道。”

En: Lick it, but only a little. An itty-bitty little lick.
Zh: 舔一小口。非常非常小，特别特别小的那种。

En: Responsible drug use. Just a faint bitter taste on the tip of your tongue. There wasn't enough to get a grown man anywhere.
Zh: 尽责的毒品使用。你的舌尖品尝到一股淡淡的苦味。这点量不够让一个成年男子怎么样。

En: You run your tongue across the plate four or five times. Like a dog. Still, just a very faint, bitter taste. This isn't enough to get a big man anywhere.
Zh: 你伸出舌头来回舔了盘子四五下。就像一条狗。不过，还是只有一点非常微弱的苦味。这点量不够让一个成年男子怎么样。

En: Yes, there isn't enough anyway. You'd only be *fooling* yourself.
Zh: 是的，反正这点量也不多。你不过是在*愚弄*自己。

En: The lieutenant isn't studying the powder in the mirror. He's studying you.
Zh: 警督并不是在研究镜子里的粉末。他在研究你。

En: Someone has taken narcotics here. Perhaps the police should interfere?
Zh: “有人拿走了这里的麻醉剂。也许警方应该介入？”

En: I wasn't thinking about taking it, I swear! I was thinking about *justice*.
Zh: “我绝对没想过拿走它，我发誓！我不过是想到了*正义*。”

En: Perhaps not? He looks at you. "This is below our pay grade, detective. However..." He points to the ladder in the corner.
Zh: “还是不要比较好吧？”他看着你。“警探，以我们的薪金等级，不该做这种事。不过……”他指了指角落的梯子。

En: I've heard amphetamines make you a really good detective. Are *you* a... really good detective?
Zh: “我听说安非他命能让你变成一个真正的好警探。所以，*你*是个好警探吗？”

En: Of course, detective. *Swift* justice. Don't worry, we don't have to investigate every trace of narcotics... The lieutenant points to the ladder in the corner.
Zh: “当然了，警探。*迅速*的正义。别担心，我们不需要调查麻醉剂的所有来源……”警督指了指角落里的梯子。

En: No, I'm just a *regular* detective. Thank you very much.
Zh: “不，我只是个*普通*的警探。谢谢。”

En: Well, detective, it appears you're on the way to solving the case... The lieutenant looks around, writes something in his notebook, and turns to you...
Zh: “警探，看来你就快要解决这个案件了……”警督看了看周围，在笔记本里画了几笔，然后转向你……

En: The missing locust case, which is a sub-case of the imaginary insect case. So at least *that's* going well.
Zh: “蝗虫失踪案，是虚构昆虫案下属的二级案件。至少*那个案子*进行地还不错。”

En: Sounds like you found the locusts, detective.
Zh: 看来你发现蝗虫了，警探。

En: I need to tell Morell...
Zh: 我得告诉莫雷尔……

En: As you turn away, heaps of leaves are rotting among the mud-cake towers. Dozens of little locusts feed on them, buzzing away with vicious joy...
Zh: 你转过脸，看到大片大片的树叶在泥蛋糕塔里渐渐腐烂。一群小蝗虫以腐叶为食，带着罪恶的愉悦感在周围嗡嗡低语。坤诺能待在这个地方，真是超越了自己的极限。

En: Yes. We need to tell Morell about this immediately.
Zh: “没错。我们必须马上告诉莫雷尔。”

En: Wait -- could this mean the Insulindian phasmid is nearby?
Zh: “等等——难道说伊苏林迪竹节虫就在这附近？”

En: If anything, the presence of the locusts points to the *opposite* -- the phasmid did not take the bait from the traps.
Zh: “如果真有什么的话，那蝗虫的存在指向了*相反*的推论——竹节虫没有拿走陷阱里的诱饵。”

En: Instead, it was a kid's prank. He shrugs. "But what do I know?"
Zh: “相反，这只是小孩的恶作剧而已。”他耸了耸肩。“不过我怎么知道呢？”

En: Use your powers of deduction! You knew the bug was nowhere near here. The phasmid is impairing your judgement.
Zh: 运用你的推理能力！你知道那只充满魔力的虫子根本不在这里。竹节虫削弱了你的判断能力。

En: Of course. I'll leave that to you. You seem to have a *handle* on the phasmid-trap-insect situation.
Zh: “当然。这个就交给你了。你好像很会*处理*竹节虫陷阱的情况。”

En: We should talk to the kid outside. It was probably him. Get him to stop. [Leave.]
Zh: “我们应该跟外面的孩子聊聊。也许是他做的。一定要让他停手。”[离开。]

En: Heaps of leaves are rotting among the mud-cake towers. Dozens of little locusts feed on them, buzzing away with vicious joy. The kid in the yard has really outdone himself here.
Zh: 大片大片的树叶在泥蛋糕塔里渐渐腐烂。一群小蝗虫以腐叶为食，带着罪恶的愉悦感在周围嗡嗡低语。院子里的小孩能待在这个地方，真是超越了自己的极限。

En: I'll let you handle that side of things. You're doing just fine.
Zh: “这个就交给你处理了。你做的挺不错的。”

En: Well, detective, it appears you've solved the case... The lieutenant looks around, writes something in his notebook, and turns to you...
Zh: “警探，看来你已经解决这个案件了……”警督看了看周围，在笔记本里画了几笔，然后转向你……

En: All around you, the hisses and chirps of locusts fill the musky air. The earthen floor of the shack has been shaped into mounds of mud dotted with little holes for windows.
Zh: 你周围到处都是蝗虫的嘶鸣声，充斥在弥漫着麝香味的空气中。棚屋的地板堆成了泥土的形状，而上面斑驳的小洞就是窗户。

En: Like skyscrapers, spires of dirt and sand rising. Accommodations for their insectoid inhabitants?
Zh: 尖尖的泥土和沙石拔地而起，就像摩天大楼一样。应该是昆虫们的住所吧？

En: Of the locusts. For the missing locust case, which is a sub-case of the imaginary insect case. So at least *that's* going well.
Zh: “是蝗虫的。蝗虫失踪案，是虚构昆虫案下属的二级案件。所以，至少*那个案子*进行地还不错。”

En: Yes, precisely what I was thinking!
Zh: “没错，我刚好就是这么想的。”

En: Stop being so sarcastic, Kim.
Zh: “别这么刻薄嘛，金。”

En: Oh, I'm not being sarcastic *at all*. We are making *real* progress here.
Zh: “哦，对了，我完全没有*刻薄*。我们*的确*是取得进展了。”

En: When someone says they're not being sarcastic, it's usually a good sign that they're being *very* sarcastic.
Zh: 如果有人说自己并不刻薄，通常都是*非常*刻薄的最佳标志。

En: Yes. He nods. "I feel we are nearing a *real* breakthrough."
Zh: “是的。”他点点头。“我觉得我们*真的*就快有重大突破了。”

En: You think the Insulindian phasmid is nearby?
Zh: “你觉得伊苏林迪竹节虫就在附近？”

En: We should talk to Cuno about this. Get him to stop. [Leave.]
Zh: “我们应该跟坤诺聊聊这个。让他停手。”[离开。]

En: If anything, the presence of the locusts points to the opposite -- the phasmid did not take the bait from the traps. It was Cuno. The phasmid doesn't exist...
Zh: “如果真有什么的话，那蝗虫的存在指向了相反的推论——竹节虫没有拿走陷阱里的诱饵。是坤诺。而且竹节虫根本不存在……”

En: Use your powers of deduction! You knew the magic bug was nowhere near here. The phasmid is impairing your judgement.
Zh: 运用你的推理能力！你知道那只充满魔力的虫子根本不在这里。竹节虫削弱了你的判断能力。

En: He shrugs. "But what do I know?"
Zh: 他耸耸肩。“那我怎么知道？”

En: What is this?
Zh: 这是什么？

En: I should go and ask him to stop then. [Finish thought.]
Zh: 我应该去找他，让他停手。[完成思维。]

En: Heaps of leaves are rotting among the mud-cake towers. Dozens of little locusts feed on them, buzzing away with vicious joy. Cuno has really outdone himself here.
Zh: 大片大片的树叶在泥蛋糕塔里渐渐腐烂。一群小蝗虫以腐叶为食，带着罪恶的愉悦感在周围嗡嗡低语。坤诺能待在这个地方，真是超越了自己的极限。

En: It's an ode to self expression.
Zh: 这是活出真我的一篇颂歌。

En: It's the work of a self-taught visionary.
Zh: 这是一位自学成才的博学家的杰作。

En: Sounds like you found the locusts, detective.
Zh: 看来你发现蝗虫了，警探。

En: I'll let you handle the Cuno side of things. You're doing just fine.
Zh: “坤诺的问题就交给你处理吧。你做的挺好的。”
